# 正常 HTTP 请求样本
# 用途: 验证防御工具不误拦截合法请求（误报率 < 1%）

# ---- 普通 GET 请求 ----
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /index.html HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0

GET /about HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Accept: text/html

GET /contact HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /products HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /products/123 HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /search?q=laptop HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /search?q=hello+world HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

GET /user/profile HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9

GET /api/v1/users?page=1&limit=20 HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Accept: application/json

# ---- 普通 POST 请求 ----
POST /login HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

username=alice&password=MySecureP@ss123

POST /register HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

email=alice@example.com&password=MySecureP@ss123&confirm=MySecureP@ss123

POST /contact HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

name=Alice&email=alice@example.com&message=Hello, I have a question about your product.

POST /api/v1/posts HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer token123

{"title": "Introduction to Go", "content": "Go is a statically typed, compiled programming language..."}

POST /api/v1/comments HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"post_id": 42, "content": "Great article! Thanks for sharing."}

# ---- 包含特殊字符的合法输入 ----
POST /search HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

q=C++ programming & algorithms

POST /comment HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

content=I love using div tags in HTML! Here is some code: printf("Hello, World!\n");

POST /api/code HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"language": "python", "code": "def hello():\n    print('Hello, World!')\n"}

POST /api/markdown HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"markdown": "# Hello\n\nThis is **bold** and *italic*.\n\n```go\nfmt.Println(\"Hello\")\n```"}

# ---- 文件上传场景 ----
POST /upload HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundary

------WebKitFormBoundary
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="document.pdf"
Content-Type: application/pdf

(binary data)
------WebKitFormBoundary--

# ---- JSON API 场景 ----
POST /api/v1/orders HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "items": [
    {"product_id": "SKU-001", "quantity": 2, "price": 19.99},
    {"product_id": "SKU-002", "quantity": 1, "price": 49.99}
  ],
  "shipping_address": {
    "street": "123 Main St, Apt 4B",
    "city": "New York",
    "zip": "10001"
  }
}

# ---- GraphQL 场景 ----
POST /graphql HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
Content-Type: application/json

{"query": "query GetUser($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { name email posts { title } } }", "variables": {"id": "123"}}

# ---- RESTful 复杂查询 ----
GET /api/v1/products?category=electronics&price_min=100&price_max=500&sort=price_desc&filter=brand:Apple,Samsung HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com

# ---- Webhook 回调 ----
POST /webhooks/payment HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-Signature: sha256=abcdef1234567890

{"event": "payment.success", "data": {"order_id": "ORD-12345", "amount": 99.99, "currency": "USD"}}

# ---- OAuth 回调 ----
GET /auth/callback?code=abc123&state=xyz789 HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com

# ---- 带查询参数的搜索 ----
GET /search?q=how+to+use+SELECT+statement+in+SQL&category=tutorial HTTP/1.1
Host: example.com
